title: InfExtraction
description: Structured metadata extracted from a Windows INF (driver installation) file

version.description: Key-value pairs from the [Version] section (Class, ClassGuid, Provider, DriverVer, etc.)

models.description: Hardware models declared in the INF with PnP hardware IDs

hardware_id.description: PCI/USB/ACPI hardware ID (the join key for device-to-driver mapping)

install_section.description: DDInstall section name for this device

ddinstall.description: Service installation details per DDInstall section

service_binary.description: Driver binary filename from ServiceBinary directive

encoding_uncertain.description: True if the file could only be decoded via latin-1 fallback (encoding detection inconclusive)
